boxDescription: The engine compartment fuse block is on the passenger side of the engine compartment. Lift the fuse block cover to access the fuses.

boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is in the end of the driver side of the instrument panel. To access the fuses, remove the end panel by gently prying with a plastic tool near each clip, beginning at the point shown.

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse block is behind a cover on the driver side of the rear compartment. The vehicle may not be equipped with all of the fuses, relays, and features shown.
